children.text: Step back into history at Ashley Nostalgia's Antique Photorium! Dress up and get your photo taken  in the finest costumes from a variety of old time eras from 1890's western cowboys to kings, queens, and pirates! Stop by! Our goal is -  A good time, the perfect costume, a quality photo, but above all a Good Time!
A one stop shop for everything character! This store carries everything character from apparel, to toys and plush!
Located outside the main gate across from Hersheypark Place. This store has chocolate and more chocolate! Enjoy fresh cut fudge, chocolate covered pretzels and your favorite Hershey's candy!
Come shop our widest assortment of candy in the park! Enjoy fresh cut fudge, chocolate bulk specialties and your favorite Hershey's candy!
Airbrush, Henna, Caricatures, Hair Wrap, Face Painting and Glitter Tattoos
View and purchase photos taken by a Hersheypark photographer at this location.
Make sure to stop in the shop that has the largest assortment of Hershey's merchandise! Take home your Bar, Kiss, Reese and Twizzler souvenirs! Oh yeah, and there's Hershey's candy!
A shop filled with everything Character including a Kiss Boutique! Heat press personalization located here, as well as package pickup!
Things To Do Just For You
